Test Case Description: Verify successful login with valid credentials (positive scenario)
Pre-Condition: User account exists and is active
Test Steps: 1. Navigate to app.vwo.com 2. Enter valid registered email 3. Enter valid corresponding password 4. Click Login button
Expected Result: User is redirected to main VWO dashboard; session is established; user sees personalized dashboard

Pre-Condition: Verify real-time email format validation triggers on blur (negative scenario)
Expected Result: 1. Navigate to app.vwo.com 2. Click into email field 3. Type "userexample.com" 4. Tab or click out of email field (blur)
Actual Result: Field shows email format validation error message; error is immediate and clear; specialized mobile keyboard not triggered (desktop context)

Test Case Description: Verify error handling for non-existent account (negative scenario)
Pre-Condition: No account associated with the email address
Test Steps: 1. Navigate to app.vwo.com 2. Enter email not registered with VWO 3. Enter any password 4. Click Login
Expected Result: Clear actionable error message indicating authentication failure; no account enumeration leak (generic message)

Test Case Description: Verify error handling for wrong password (negative scenario)
Test Steps: 1. Navigate to app.vwo.com 2. Enter valid registered email 3. Enter wrong password 4. Click Login
Expected Result: Clear actionable error message for failed authentication; password field may be cleared or highlighted; no lockout unless threshold exceeded

Test Data: Valid email + valid password + "Remember Me" checked
Test Case Description: Verify persistent login session when Remember Me is enabled (positive scenario)
Pre-Condition: User account exists; browser accepts cookies
Test Steps: 1. Navigate to app.vwo.com 2. Check "Remember Me" checkbox 3. Enter valid credentials 4. Click Login 5. Close browser 6. Reopen browser and navigate to app.vwo.com
Expected Result: User remains logged in or session persists without re-entering credentials (within session timeout limits)

Test Case Description: Verify autofocus on first input field (email) on page load
Test Steps: 1. Navigate to app.vwo.com 2. Do not click anywhere 3. Observe cursor position
Expected Result: Cursor automatically placed in email input field ready for typing without additional clicks

Test Case Description: Verify loading state displayed during authentication processing
Pre-Condition: User credentials submitted; network delay simulated
Test Steps: 1. Navigate to app.vwo.com 2. Enter valid credentials 3. Click Login 4. Observe button/interface during authentication
Expected Result: Loading spinner or disable button or "Processing" message appears; user cannot submit again until response received

Test Data: Multiple rapid login attempts from same IP
Test Case Description: Verify rate limiting protects against brute force attacks (non-functional/security)
Pre-Condition: Login endpoint accessible; no prior rate limit blocks
Test Steps: 1. Navigate to app.vwo.com 2. Attempt login with wrong credentials repeatedly (e.g.
Expected Result: 10+ times in 1 minute) using script or rapid manual clicks
Status: system returns rate limiting error or temporary block; no successful brute force

Test Steps: Verify full keyboard navigation for all interactive elements (non-functional/accessibility)
Expected Result: Login page loaded; screen reader not required for this test
Actual Result: 1. Navigate to app.vwo.com 2. Press Tab repeatedly 3. Verify focus moves to email
Priority: signup link 4. Press Enter on focused Login button 5. Press Space on checkbox
Is Automated: Focus indicator visible on each element; Enter triggers login; Space toggles checkbox; no mouse needed
